change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value:
A description of the main activities of the project 
 
4.1 Rehabilitation services for children affected by armed conflict (CAAC, CAAFAG, VMLR) in 33/59 districts.
4.2 Monitoring, reporting and response to core violations of children´s rights in armed conflict (UNSCR 1612) in 46 districts.
4.3 Documentation and response to sexual violence during conflict in 14 districts
4.4 Access to transitional justice (TJ) for children whose rights were violated during the armed conflict, in the framework of the Truth and Reconciliation Commission (TRC)
4.5 Prevention of explosive device (ED)/small arm incidents and assistance to survivors in 75 districts.

snapshot.implementing_agency: Forum for Women, Law & Development, Centre for Victims of Torture Nepal, Central Child Welfare Committee, Community Development Programme, Children Women in Social Service and Human Rights, Terre Des Hommes, Child Welfare Society, Save the Children, JSI Research & Training Institute Inc/World Education, Beautiful Nepal Association, Search for Common Ground, Advocary Forum, Central Child Welfare Board, Human Rights Network and Peace Action Group, Diyalo Pariwar, Society of Local Volunteers Effort, Indreni Rural Development Centre, Informal Sector Service Centre, Siddhartha Social Development Center, Rural Development Center, Panch Tara Yuva Samrakshyak Manch, Himalayan Human Rights Monitors, Transcultural Psychosocial Organization, Ecology, Agriculture and Rural Development Society, Integrated Community Development Campaign, Rural Community Development Service Council

en.full: PCR 4, IR 4: Child Protection - Armed Conflict
